items.description: The sculpture is an angel standing hunched over. One wing hangs down towards the ground and other wing extends towards the sky. The chest cavity is hollowed out and the left arm crosses over its torso.  The right hand holds a sword that touches the ground.
items.additionalData: Signature on backside of the sculpture. 'FP' is also inscribed on the back, as it is a foundry proof.
items.title: Requiem

items.description: This tapestry has at least 10 men fighting in battle with many on horseback. There is a decorative border, and according to the former owner's widow, comprised of strong, dark colors with reds and blues.
items.title: Judgment of Wisdom

items.description: French blue flourishes are painted on each of the four corners. Within the 11 1/3" in diameter roundel outlined in gold metallic paint is a single figure wearing a yellow drum with red rims. He holds two sticks as though playing the drum while he glances toward the viewer's left. There is a wood enclosure at left foreground. The drummer is wearing a blue coat with gold buttons. His hat has a red feather attached in front.
items.additionalData: painting; man; walking; drum; hat; Abraham Lincoln; Part of Lincoln's private railway car as decorative panels.
items.title: Roundel with Drummer
